title: Monday integration with google drive
excerpt: I’d like to use monday.com to manage the approval review and approval workflow of standard operating procedures authored and stored in google docs. There are several ways to achieve this, but I am looking for a developer…

posts.author: Magnacanna (Jacques van den Berg)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to use monday.com to manage the approval review and approval workflow of standard operating procedures authored and stored in google docs. There are several ways to achieve this, but I am looking for a developer who can write custom code on both platforms. I prefer not want to use automate.io, zapier or integromat.

posts.author: Elise-JTsCloud (Elise Powley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Magnacanna!
Our team has been working on an approval process - it would be great to set up a time to chat about what your goal is and see what we can do to help you achieve it! If you email me at elise@jtscloud.com we can set this up
